revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:飽富神社]][[sv:Akitomi-jinja]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Akitomi Shrine | native_name = 飽富神社 | image = Akitomijinja.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Akitomi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.420924|139.985375}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ukanomitama|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama|de|Ukanomitama|en|Ukanomitama|eo|Ukanomitama|fr|Uka-no-Mitama|ja|ウカノミタマ|mni|ꯎꯀꯅꯣꯃꯤꯇꯃ|ru|Ука-но митама|simple|Ukanomitama|sv|Ukanomitama|th|อูกาโนมิตามะ|zh|宇迦之御魂神|qid=Q3080728|1=Ukanomitama}} }} {{nihongo|'''Akitomi Shrine'''|飽富神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kazusa Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Kazusa Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Kazusa Province|ja|上総国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11360032|1=List of Shikinaisha in Kazusa Province}} ** Series ordinal: 5 ** P155: {{ill|Anesaki Shrine|lt=Anesaki Shrine|ja|姉埼神社|sv|Anesaki-jinja|qid=Q11447235|1=Anesaki Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Katori Shrine|lt=Katori Jingū|de|Katori-jingū|en|Katori Shrine|fi|Katori-jingū|fr|Katori-jingū|ja|香取神宮|la|Katori Templum|ro|Katori (sanctuar)|zh|香取神宮|qid=Q372380|1=Katori Jingū}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Sodegaura|lt=Sodegaura|ar|سوديغوارا (تشيبا)|arz|سوديجوارا|azb|سودقائورا، چیبا|ceb|Sodegaura-shi|ce|Содегаура|de|Sodegaura|en|Sodegaura|eo|Sodegaura|es|Sodegaura (Chiba)|fa|سودگائورا، چیبا|fi|Sodegaura|fr|Sodegaura|gl|Sodegaura|it|Sodegaura|ja|袖ケ浦市|ko|소데가우라시|mzn|سودگائورا، چیبا|nl|Sodegaura|pl|Sodegaura|pt|Sodegaura|ro|Sodegaura|ru|Содегаура|simple|Sodegaura|sv|Sodegaura|sw|Sodegaura, Chiba|tg|Содегаура|th|โซเดงาอูระ|tl|Sodegaura|tr|Sodegaura|tt|Содегаура|tum|Sodegaura|uk|Содеґаура|ur|سودیگاورا، چیبا|uz|Sodegaura|vi|Sodegaura, Chiba|war|Sodegaura, Chiba|zh_classical|袖浦市|zh_min_nan|Sodegaura-chhī|zh_yue|袖浦|zh|袖浦市|qid=Q646847|1=Sodegaura}} * {{ill|Kazusa Province|lt=Kazusa Province|cs|Provincie Kazusa|de|Provinz Kazusa|en|Kazusa Province|es|Provincia de Kazusa|fa|ولایت کازوسا|fr|Province de Kazusa|gl|Provincia de Kazusa|hak|Kazusa-koet|id|Provinsi Kazusa|it|Kazusa|ja|上総国|ko|가즈사국|lt|Kadzusos žemė|nl|Kazusa (provincie)|pt|Província de Kazusa|ru|Кадзуса (провинция)|simple|Kazusa Province|sk|Kazusa (provincia)|sr|Провинција Казуса|tr|Kazusa (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Кадзуса|zh_classical|上總國|zh_min_nan|Kazusa-kok|zh_yue|上總國|zh|上總國|qid=Q1055394|1=Kazusa Province}} * {{ill|Mōda district|lt=Mōda district|ja|望陀郡|qid=Q11517166|1=Mōda district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.420924|139.985375}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Akitomijinja.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q3080728|ltq=Q3080728|qid=Q3080728|1=Ukanomitama}} == founded by (P112) == * {{ill|Kamuyaimimi|lt=Kamuyaimimi-no-mikoto|en|Kamuyaimimi|fr|Kamuyaimimi|ja|神八井耳命|ko|카무야이미미노미코토|simple|Kamuyaimimi|zh|神八井耳命|qid=Q11588756|1=Kamuyaimimi}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181742 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} * {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|ko|정5위|zh|正五位|qid=Q11123280|1=Senior Fifth Rank}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == postal code (P281) == * 299-0256https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3040005008164 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '千葉県袖ケ浦市飯富2863', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:飽富神社]] [[SV:Akitomi-jinja]] {{wikidata link|Q85884553}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=September 2020}} {{Shrine | Name=Akitomi Shrine | Image=[[Image:akitomijinja.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} | Location={{ill|lt=Chiba Prefecture|Q80011|qid=Q80011|1=Chiba Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Sodegaura City|Q646847|qid=Q646847|1=Sodegaura}} Iitomi 2863 | Coordinates={{Wiki coordinates DMS|35|25|15|N|139|59|7|E|display=title,inline}} | Deity={{ill|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama|Q3080728|qid=Q3080728|1=Ukanomitama}} | Shrine rank=Former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Prefectural shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} | Founded=First year of Emperor Suizei | Main hall= | Annual festival=July 24 | Rituals= | Map= {{Location map|Japan Chiba|label=Akitomi Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Akitomi Shrine''' (あきとみじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Higashibaba, Iitomi, {{ill|lt=Sodegaura City|Q646847|qid=Q646847|1=Sodegaura}}, {{ill|lt=Chiba Prefecture|Q80011|qid=Q80011|1=Chiba Prefecture}}. ===Origin=== It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} whose name already appears in the “{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q1052981|lt=Sandai Jitsuroku|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}” and the “{{ill|lt=Engishiki|Q1342448|qid=Q1342448|1=Engishiki}},” compiled during the {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|qid=Q193292|1=Heian period}}, and is an ancient shrine that has existed for more than a thousand years. Its former name was Otomi Shrine, and it is the only Shikinaisha in the Kimitsu region, making it of high historical value. According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the first year of the reign of the second emperor, {{ill|lt=Emperor Suizei|Q313321|qid=Q313321|1=Emperor Suizei}}, by the emperor’s elder brother {{ill|lt=Kamuyaimimi no Mikoto|Q11588756|qid=Q11588756|1=Kamuyaimimi}}. The principal enshrined deity is Ukanomitama no Mikoto, that is, a god of agriculture. The shrine buildings are in the {{ill|lt=Gongen-zukuri|Q3155268|qid=Q3155268|lt=Gongen style|1=Ishi-no-ma-zukuri}}, rebuilt in the 4th year of {{ill|lt=Genroku|Q1325001|qid=Q1325001|1=Genroku}} ({{ill|lt=1691|Q7682|qid=Q7682|1=1691}})On-site information board. ===Access=== From {{ill|lt=Sodegaura Station|Q573413|qid=Q573413|1=Sodegaura Station}}, take a {{ill|lt=Nitto Kotsu (Chiba Prefecture)|Q11509502|qid=Q11509502|lt=Nitto Kotsu|1=Nitto Kotsu}} bus bound for Nozomino, Hirakawa Administrative Center, or Tokyo German Village, and get off at “Iitomi.” === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === Related items === * {{ill|lt=500 Selections of the Charms of Bōsō|Q11496691|qid=Q11496691|1=Best 500 attractions in Chiba}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Pref-stub|pref=Chiba Prefecture}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Akitomi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Akitomi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kazusa Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Chiba Prefecture]] [[Category:袖ケ浦市の歴史]] [[Category:袖ケ浦市の建築物]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Kazusa Province]] [[Category:Ō clan]] [[Category:Top 500 Attractions of Bōsō Peninsula]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Chiba Prefecture]] [[Category:Ō clan]] [[Category:incorrect template category applied]]
